description_long: This house features a symmetrical, sprawling layout with multiple interconnected rectangular sections, each topped by a steep, pink hip roof. The central section is slightly elevated and projects forward, creating a prominent entryway with a covered porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are a light, neutral color, contrasting with the vibrant pink roofs. The front facade includes a set of double doors flanked by large windows, and a small circular garden or planter is positioned directly in front of the entrance. The house sits on a green lawn, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood setting. The overall design is formal and balanced, with a focus on geometric repetition and a welcoming central entry.
description: A large, symmetrical house with multiple pink hip roofs, light-colored walls, and a prominent central entryway with columns and a small front garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, double doors, large windows, and a circular garden feature.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the house, the repeating hip roof sections, and the extended green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back walls and the series of pink hip roofs without visible entry or window details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the house's depth, roof repetition, and the expansive lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with columns, covered porch, and a small circular garden feature.
